source_notes: Italian rows are parsed from saved CONSOB major-shareholding list or dated communication pages when available; blocked Radware CAPTCHA pages are skipped.
German rows currently include Bundesanzeiger Capital market / Securities acquisition and takeover search results for current offer targets.
All other non-France jurisdictions are in manual alert mode: the tracker records the official source to watch and accepts manual filing rows.
The current-offer universe is imported from the European public tracker workbook when available.
